name: If I Close My Eyes Now
original_name: Se Eu Fechar os Olhos Agora
overview: In a quiet town, two boys find a woman's mutilated body. After becoming suspects at first and realizing there is a mystery behind that murder, they decide to investigate the case with the help of an enigmatic old man. When a vertiginous spiral of violence is triggered, conspiracy begins to emerge and the boys must discover the truth as soon as possible in order not to become the next victims.

trailers.title: Trailer Internacional da minissérie Se eu fechar os olhos agora
